name: Genesis Catboy #012
description:
Catboy Genesis — the special launch edition. 100 original high-quality Catboy pieces on Solana. Genesis holders unlock top-tier utility: casino edge, Catboy City ownership, fighter skins, and treasury perks.

🎁 Holder Perks: Stake to earn $CATBOY (10% of every NFT sale), whale-group access, casino edge, arcade fighter skin, merch discounts, free AI PFP, governance votes, and airdrop + whitelist priority. See catboyonsol.fun/stake.html
